commands.purpose: Table view of athletes. Filterable by tenant, branch, status, current_age_group_id, has_user (linked to a User), is_minor. --include-archived shows archived; default hides them. Medical + emergency contact fields NEVER shown at CLI — support-tooling redaction still applies. Minor names redacted to initials.

Verbose read of one Athlete row: base fields + linked User + Profile (redacted if invoker lacks permissions) + guardians summary (Wave 3a sibling) + enrollment summary (Wave 3a sibling) + consent snapshot + medical summary (only when invoked with --show-medical AND caller carries athletes.view.medical).

Scriptable athlete create (test harness + tenant import flow). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting. Medical + emergency contact CANNOT be set from this CLI — use the /medical + /emergency-contact endpoints (permission-gated).
CLI equivalent of POST /{athlete}/link-user. One-shot — refused when athlete already has user_id set.
Soft-terminal — kept for alumni. --cascade closes active enrollments in one transaction.
Terminal. Refuses without --reason. --cascade closes active enrollments; --guardian-initiated flags the withdrawal path for the parent-facing UI.
Terminal archive. Releases 1 unit of athlete_slot.
Record consents from CLI. --recorded-by is the User ULID of the guardian/admin recording. For minors, must be an authorised guardian (Wave 3b hard-fail).
One-shot invocation of RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob. --athlete=<id> targets one athlete; --tenant=<id> processes every athlete in a tenant; --all processes every athlete across all tenants.

Compliance-only export. Emits a signed audit CSV of every entry in athlete_medical_history for the tenant + window. Requires super_admin token + two-person approval. Every invocation writes a P1 audit row + notifies the tenant's safeguarding_officer + compliance address.
Cascade-recompute after an AgeGroup bounds / cutoff change. Runs against every athlete referring to the given age group + its neighbours; reports the delta before applying (--dry-run available).
